description:
## 🤖 New release * `balls`: 0.3.8 -> 0.3.9
Changelog

## [0.3.9](https://github.com/mudbungie/balls/compare/v0.3.8...v0.3.9) - 2026-04-25 ### Changes - prime --json: route 'sync complete' to stderr [bl-f0b8] - document JSON shape per --json command [bl-59fd] - warn when sibling deliveries overlap your file footprint [bl-89e0] - accept --as for identity override [bl-6f1a] - surface main-ahead count for each claimed task [bl-23b0] - task types: free-form identifier labels [bl-091d] - dep tree: dotted sibling annotation on non-root rows [bl-368a] - guide agents on when to claim gate targets [bl-dfa6] - install `balls` symlink alongside `bl` [bl-e28f] - --forget-half-push retracts stale half-push warnings [bl-e446] ### Changes - `bl repair --forget-half-push ` and `--forget-all-half-pushes` retract stale half-push warnings via a `state: forget-half-push ` marker commit on the state branch [bl-e446] - `bl dep tree` annotates non-root rows with a dotted sibling path (`.1`, `.1.2`, …) next to the id so parent chains read off at a glance without changing task ids; `--json` adds `hier_path` (omitted on roots) [bl-368a] - task types are now free-form identifier labels: `bl create -t feature|chore|spike|…` works without code change; only `epic` still carries behavior (progress bar, `[epic]` marker); deserialize stays lenient for forward-compat [bl-091d]

--- This PR was generated with [release-plz](https://github.com/release-plz/release-plz/).
title: chore: release v0.3.9
